message:
feat(abi): export 88 implemented symbols in libc.map version script

Adds all previously-implemented symbols to the GNU ld version script
so they are actually exported from the shared library:

- String/memory: memccpy, memmem, mempcpy, strcasecmp, strncasecmp,
  strcasestr, strdup, strndup, strerror, strerror_r, strcoll, strxfrm,
  strlcat, strlcpy, strsep, strspn, strcspn, strpbrk, swab, index,
  rindex, bcmp, bcopy, bzero, explicit_bzero
- Wide string: wcscspn, wcsdup, wcsncat, wcspbrk, wcsspn, wcstok
- Stdlib: abs, labs, llabs, div, ldiv, lldiv, atof, strtod, strtof,
  rand, rand_r, srand, ffs, ffsl, ffsll
- Ctype: isascii, isblank, iscntrl, isgraph, toascii
- Math f64: fdim, fma, fmax, fmin, nearbyint, modf, frexp, ldexp,
  ilogb, logb, scalbn, scalbln, nextafter, lrint, llrint, lround,
  llround, erfc
- Math f32: sinf, cosf, tanf, asinf, acosf, atanf, atan2f, expf,
  log2f, log10f, logf, powf, sqrtf, fabsf, fmodf, ceilf, floorf,
  roundf, truncf

All 482 support_matrix symbols now have corresponding libc.map entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
